pageDescription: Manage and organize your organization's documents and categories.

upload.dropPrompt: Drag & drop or click to browse
upload.fileTypesHint: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, TXT, MD, PPTX · Max 50 MB
upload.departmentsHint: Select which departments can access this document. Leave empty for global access.
upload.visibilityGlobalWarning: Document content will be compiled into the shared wiki and visible to all employees — including those without access to the original file. Only upload if the content is not sensitive.

errors.fileTooLarge: File too large. Maximum size is 50 MB.
